---
title: "Arthur John Coleridge Mackarness"
---

## Arthur John Coleridge Mackarness

### Description

son of Alethea Mackarness

### Biography

He is mentioned (30 April 1865); he was the son of the Rt. Rev. John Fielder Mackarness and Alethea Coleridge;  he became a solicitor, and married (1890) Ada Mary Pattenden.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
